stages.name: analyze_request
stages.description: Parse feature request, assess scope and complexity, detect project type
stages.pauseInstructions:
1. **Proceed** — scope looks correct, start planning
2. **Amend** — adjust the scope or add details
3. **Cancel** — abandon this request
pauseChoices: Amend — adjust scope or add details

stages.name: plan
stages.description: Research codebase and generate implementation plan with phases
stages.pauseInstructions:
Review the implementation plan below. Check that the phases, key files, and testing strategy match your expectations.

1. **Approve** — start adversarial review, then implement
2. **Amend** — tell me what to change and I'll revise the plan
3. **Cancel** — abandon this request

stages.name: review
stages.description: Adversarial review of the plan — find bugs, security issues, design flaws

stages.name: refine_plan
stages.description: Address review findings and produce refined implementation plan
stages.pauseInstructions:
1. **Approve** — start implementation
2. **Amend** — request further changes
3. **Cancel** — abandon this request

stages.name: implement
stages.description: Execute refined plan phase by phase with typecheck and lint validation

stages.name: test_and_diagnose
stages.description: Run tests, capture evidence, classify bugs, assess progress

stages.name: decide
stages.description: Convergence assessment — done, restart inner loop, or escalate

2.blockMessage: Stage 2 BLOCKED: findings (array of review items) and plan_verdict (pass/warn/fail) are required. Review all plan phases and produce findings with severity levels.

3.blockMessage: Stage 3 BLOCKED: refined_plan (string) and final_phases (array of implementation phases) are required. Address all critical findings and produce updated phases.

4.blockMessage: Stage 4 BLOCKED: files_modified (array of changed file paths) and typecheck_passed (boolean) are required. Run typecheck and lint, then complete with the results.

5.blockMessage: Stage 5 BLOCKED: tests_passed (boolean), total_tests (number), and needsRepair (boolean) are required. Run the test suite and report results. If tests fail, set needsRepair=true with repair_feedback describing what to fix.

6.blockMessage: Stage 6 BLOCKED: decision is required. Must be 'done' (all tests pass), 'restart' (try again with lessons learned), or 'escalate' (needs human intervention).
